mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( phone, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar, bio, handle, gender, birthday, school, tags_json, role, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{handle}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{school}, #{tagsJson}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'USER'), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE handle = #{handle} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT id, handle, nickname, avatar, bio, tags_json, created_at FROM users WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET banned_at = #{bannedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users
( nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR handle LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
